name: appstoreconnect-mcp
description: StoreOps MCP tools for App Store metadata, IAPs, subscriptions, localization, reviews, reports, and ASO operations.

interface.shortDescription: Manage App Store metadata, IAPs, subscriptions, and ASO workflows.
interface.longDescription: StoreOps MCP adds a local stdio MCP server for authenticated App Store Connect operations: apps, versions, builds, metadata, localizations, screenshots, IAPs, subscriptions, custom product pages, promoted purchases, reviews, Sales and Trends reports, Analytics Reports, and explicit metadata/localization writes. Credentials are read from environment variables.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use StoreOps App Store Connect tools to audit my app metadata, localizations, screenshots, IAPs, subscriptions, reviews, and analytics readiness before making any writes.
